main.description: A tea vendor — seller, blender, or importer of tea

name.description: Name of the vendor (e.g., 'Spirit Tea', 'Tezumi', 'Yunnan Sourcing')

location.description: Location of the vendor (e.g., 'Chicago, IL', 'Tokyo, Japan')

description.description: Description or notes about the vendor

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vendor record was created

sourceRef.description: AT-URI of the record this entity was sourced from
